positive: Symmetrical celestial mandalic pattern, depicting abstract constellations and geometric planets orbiting a central, minimalist sunburst. Style is a blend of Art Deco and Mid-Century Modern Scandinavian design. The composition must be perfectly balanced, suitable for a central apparel print. Use deep indigo, teal, muted gold, and off-white colors. Elements should feature clean, sharp silhouettes and crisp linework, maximizing contrast for screen printing. Intricate repeating patterns, clean vector style, high resolution, no gradients or photorealism.
